TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Niger Niger (Ni-Zi, kamu nu Hulam: Śįľśó•) u Niger sa i labu nu Africa , itiza i 16 00 N, 8 00 E. u ahebal nu lala'ay sa 1.267 lasubu amang km2, u ahebal nu nanumay sa 300 km2. hamin nu tademaw sa 18,638,600. kakalukan umah sa 35.10%, kilakilangan umah sa 1%, zumaay henay umah sa 63.90%. kakitidaan laupen nu pituay nu kanatalan kin Ni-ze " Si-fei balucu'".kitidaan nu Ni-ze itida i Fei-cuo nu teban timulan nu kitidaan, u Sa-ha-la likelikenan nu timula a lalabuay nu kanatalan, ina kanatal nu ami atu A-e-ci-li-ya atu Li-pi-ya malalitin, timul mahida u Nay-ci-li-ya atu Pei-nin lalikeluhan, nutipan atu Ma-li atu Pu-ci-n-fa mababiyaw, wali mahida u Ca-de mababiyaw. amis u kacaledesan nu likelikenan nu demiadan. timul kacaledesan nu lutuklutukan nu demiadan, malatusa ku demiad u kakelahan, udadan tusa ku demiad, palalalad nu demiada makaala tu lu sept u, sacaledesay nu kitakidan a kanatal. tulu ku tabakiay nu sawacan Ni-ze sauwac nu tanayu' makaala tu lim lim sep cin-mi, nikasumad nikalikidan nu nanum tabaki, nu cacayay nu mihcaan itida a cacay i cay ‚Äď tu buladan kya idaw ku namum makayda malikid, duma nu buladan makayda i kawanan a buladan makayda ku nanum, sisa Ni-ze a lala' u kedal ku angangan. Śįľśó•ŤĘę7 . tapang tusu nu kanatal ť¶ĖťÉĹśėĮNiamey . u tapang tusu nu kanatal sa u Niamey . Ni-ya-mei u Fei-cuo teban nutipan a Ni-ze-kun-he-kuo a sutu atu tabakiay nu tukay, sakay cen-ce nu kanatal, sakaudip, lalangawan atu tatelungan nu caculilan. Ni-ya-mei naw adidi'ay nu babutingan nu niyadu'an, cay siw lu nem mihcaan mala Ni-ze tukay amelik satu Malahat. cay siw nem sep mihcaan misiteked kina Ni-ze malasu-tu. cung-tung-hu, sihu matatungduhay nu kakakulian atu kakaygian nu giing itida namin. . kakingingan nu kanatal demiad ŚúčŚģ∂ÁöĄÁīÄŚŅĶśó•Áāļ12śúą8śó• kakinging nu kanatal demiad sa 12 bulad 18 demiad. tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal aydaay nu Ni-ze cung-tung ci MuhanmudeÔľéPacumu Mu-ha-muo-de. Pa-cu-mu, cay siw nem mihcaan cay bulad cay demiad lecuhan, mala Ni-ze cung-tung tu tu sept u cay mihcaan sip bulad lu demiad ÁõģŚČćŚįľśó•ÁöĄÁłĹÁĶĪśėĮMuhanmudeÔľéPacumu 2021ŚĻī4śúą2śó• cunli Śįľśó•ÁöĄÁłĹÁźÜśėĮOuhoumoudou Mahamadou , 2021ŚĻī4śúą3śó•ťÄ≤ŚćáÁāļÁłĹÁźÜ u cunli nu Niger ayza sa ci Ouhoumoudou Mahamadou , micakat a demiad sa i 2021 a mihcaan 4 bulad 3 demiad. lacul sakapahay nu kasilaculan u cuo, masingaay nu cuo lu sep wan tun, mikikaka tu kitakid nu nisingaan a cay cay pasintu. Lin-suan-yen nisingaan cay lu .lim se pyi caay henay kalian, sulu nisupedan makaala tu nem sep sep wan tun. idaw henay ku Si, Tei, apuk, simal, kim nu ba'tuan. Ni-ze caay ka kapah ku kukulian, sakay kitikid u caayay kaw malahatay nu kanatal, sakaudip u kakalukan ku angangan, sakay mukinan malakuday, nika ina tabakiay nu cuo a kusian, ina cuo sakay kitakidan sakasepat ku nikasinganganan. . A-Cia-De-Ce (ťėŅŚä†Śĺ∑ŤĆ≤, Agadez) A-de-cia-ce u Cia-ce-ce tabakiay nu kitidaan a tukay, itini i likisian taneng talaayawen mikilim katukuh tu cay sip seci, u Tu-wa-lei binacadan a sakaetiman nu tukay, mala Sa-ha-la likelikenan nu sasasiwbayan a angangan, tatelungan nu likisi itida i tu sep cay lu mihcaan mala kitidid nu lalangawan nipahetikan nu babalaki. A-cia-de-ce tatelungan nu likisi u Muo-men-hu sakasingangan, itida i Sa-ha-la-likelikenan nu tumulan, kapalekalan itida i cay lim atu cay nem seci A-yi-e-su-tan kanatal a patideng atu Tu-a-lei-ke niyadu' itini mueneng nu zitayan, lilis han u tawyaay nu malumanay a lala'an, lilisay nu macimacian mahini tu ayda. sakasinganganan makaala tu tu pic mi, u amutu atu cenga anisangaan tina A-cia-de-ce biyuan, ina biyu nisangaan sakay kitikidan u satalakaway. micidek ku kaku, tabaki, u lala' atu kilang ku sangan, malasepatay nu kakuan, kapah ku nalimaan, madimel, pitu a tungdutan, kilul hank u kayakay mahida u culen ku sakatapabaw, taneng makatukuh i tungdut, makayda i tungdut pasaysasa pa'ngaw, mamelawmelaw kina A-cia-de-cen.
S.PHON: nig…ôr nig…ôr (ni-zi, kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: **) u nig…ôr sa i r~…ĺabu nu afri ¶a , itiza i ** ** n, * ** …ô. u ańß…ôbar~…ĺ nu r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °aj sa *.*** r~…ĺasubu amaŇč km*, u ańß…ôbar~…ĺ nu nanumaj sa *** km*. ńßamin nu tad…ômaw sa **,***,***. kakar~…ĺukan umańß sa **.**%, kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan umańß sa *%, zumaaj ńß…ônaj umańß sa **.**%. kakitidaan r~…ĺaup…ôn nu pituaj nu kanatar~…ĺan kin ni-z…ô " si-f…ôi bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °".kitidaan nu ni-z…ô itida i f…ôi- ¶uo nu t…ôban timur~…ĺan nu kitidaan, u sa-ńßa-r~…ĺa r~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺik…ônan nu timur~…ĺa a r~…ĺar~…ĺabuaj nu kanatar~…ĺan, ina kanatar~…ĺ nu ami atu a-…ô- ¶i-r~…ĺi-ja atu r~…ĺi-pi-ja mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin, timur~…ĺ mańßida u naj- ¶i-r~…ĺi-ja atu p…ôi-nin r~…ĺar~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺuńßan, nutipan atu ma-r~…ĺi atu pu- ¶i-n-fa mababijaw, war~…ĺi mańßida u ¶a-d…ô mababijaw. amis u ka ¶ar~…ĺ…ôd…ôsan nu r~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺik…ônan nu d…ômiadan. timur~…ĺ ka ¶ar~…ĺ…ôd…ôsan nu r~…ĺutukr~…ĺutukan nu d…ômiadan, mar~…ĺatusa ku d…ômiad u nu bur~…ĺadan makajda i kawanan a bur~…ĺadan makajda ku nanum, sisa ni-z…ô a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° u k…ôdar~…ĺ ku aŇčaŇčan. **** . tapaŇč tusu nu kanatar~…ĺ ***niam…ô . u tapaŇč tusu nu kanatar~…ĺ sa u niam…ô . ni-ja-m…ôi u f…ôi- ¶uo t…ôban nutipan a ni-z…ô-kun-ńß…ô-kuo a sutu atu tabakiaj nu tukaj, sakaj ¶…ôn- ¶…ô nu kanatar~…ĺ, sakaudip, r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan atu tat…ôr~…ĺuŇčan nu ¶a ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan. ni-ja-m…ôi naw adidi Ē~ °aj nu babutiŇčan nu nijadu Ē~ °an, ¶aj siw r~…ĺu n…ôm mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺa ni-z…ô tukaj am…ôr~…ĺik satu mar~…ĺańßat. ¶aj siw n…ôm s…ôp mińß ¶aan misit…ôk…ôd kina ni-z…ô tabakiaj nu ¶uo a kusian, ina ¶uo sakaj kitakidan sakas…ôpat ku nikasiŇčaŇčanan. . a- ¶ia-d…ô- ¶…ô (****, agad…ôz) a-d…ô- ¶ia- ¶…ô u ¶ia- ¶…ô- ¶…ô tabakiaj nu kitidaan a tukaj, itini i r~…ĺikisian r~…ĺikisi itida i tu s…ôp ¶aj r~…ĺu mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺa kitidid nu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan nipańß…ôtikan nu babar~…ĺaki. a- ¶ia-d…ô- ¶…ô tat…ôr~…ĺuŇčan nu r~…ĺikisi u muo-m…ôn-ńßu sakasiŇčaŇčan, itida i ¶ia-d…ô- ¶…ô bijuan, ina biju nisaŇčaan sakaj kitikidan u satar~…ĺakawaj. mi ¶id…ôk ku kaku, tabaki, u r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° atu kir~…ĺaŇč ku saŇčan, mar~…ĺas…ôpataj nu kakuan, kapańß ku nar~…ĺimaan, S.FORM: Niger Niger (Ni-Zi, kamu nu Hulam: Śįľśó•) u Niger sa i labu nu Africa , itiza i 16 00 N, 8 00 E. u ahebal nu lala'ay sa 1.267 lasubu amang km2, u ahebal nu nanumay sa 300 km2. hamin nu tademaw sa 18,638,600. kakalukan umah sa 35.10%, kilakilangan umah sa 1%, zumaay henay umah sa 63.90%. kakitidaan laupen nu pituay nu kanatalan kin Ni-ze " Si-fei balucu'".kitidaan nu Ni-ze itida i Fei-cuo nu teban timulan nu kitidaan, u Sa-ha-la likelikenan nu timula a lalabuay nu kanatalan, ina kanatal nu ami atu A-e-ci-li-ya atu Li-pi-ya malalitin, timul mahida u Nay-ci-li-ya atu Pei-nin lalikeluhan, nutipan atu Ma-li atu Pu-ci-n-fa mababiyaw, wali mahida u Ca-de mababiyaw. amis u kacaledesan nu likelikenan nu demiadan. timul kacaledesan nu lutuklutukan nu demiadan, malatusa ku demiad u kakelahan, udadan tusa ku demiad, palalalad nu demiada makaala tu lu sept u, sacaledesay nu kitakidan a kanatal. tulu ku tabakiay nu sawacan Ni-ze sauwac nu tanayu' makaala tu lim lim sep cin-mi, nikasumad nikalikidan nu nanum tabaki, nu cacayay nu mihcaan itida a cacay i cay ‚Äď tu buladan kya idaw ku namum makayda malikid, duma nu buladan makayda i kawanan a buladan makayda ku nanum, sisa Ni-ze a lala' u kedal ku angangan. Śįľśó•ŤĘę7 . tapang tusu nu kanatal ť¶ĖťÉĹśėĮNiamey . u tapang tusu nu kanatal sa u Niamey . Ni-ya-mei u Fei-cuo teban nutipan a Ni-ze-kun-he-kuo a sutu atu tabakiay nu tukay, sakay cen-ce nu kanatal, sakaudip, lalangawan atu tatelungan nu caculilan. Ni-ya-mei naw adidi'ay nu babutingan nu niyadu'an, cay siw lu nem mihcaan mala Ni-ze tukay amelik satu Malahat. cay siw nem sep mihcaan misiteked kina Ni-ze malasu-tu. cung-tung-hu, sihu matatungduhay nu kakakulian atu kakaygian nu giing itida namin. . kakingingan nu kanatal demiad ŚúčŚģ∂ÁöĄÁīÄŚŅĶśó•Áāļ12śúą8śó• kakinging nu kanatal demiad sa 12 bulad 18 demiad. tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal aydaay nu Ni-ze cung-tung ci MuhanmudeÔľéPacumu Mu-ha-muo-de. Pa-cu-mu, cay siw nem mihcaan cay bulad cay demiad lecuhan, mala Ni-ze cung-tung tu tu sept u cay mihcaan sip bulad lu demiad ÁõģŚČćŚįľśó•ÁöĄÁłĹÁĶĪśėĮMuhanmudeÔľéPacumu 2021ŚĻī4śúą2śó• cunli Śįľśó•ÁöĄÁłĹÁźÜśėĮOuhoumoudou Mahamadou , 2021ŚĻī4śúą3śó•ťÄ≤ŚćáÁāļÁłĹÁźÜ u cunli nu Niger ayza sa ci Ouhoumoudou Mahamadou , micakat a demiad sa i 2021 a mihcaan 4 bulad 3 demiad. lacul sakapahay nu kasilaculan u cuo, masingaay nu cuo lu sep wan tun, mikikaka tu kitakid nu nisingaan a cay cay pasintu. Lin-suan-yen nisingaan cay lu .lim se pyi caay henay kalian, sulu nisupedan makaala tu nem sep sep wan tun. idaw henay ku Si, Tei, apuk, simal, kim nu ba'tuan. Ni-ze caay ka kapah ku kukulian, sakay kitikid u caayay kaw malahatay nu kanatal, sakaudip u kakalukan ku angangan, sakay mukinan malakuday, nika ina tabakiay nu cuo a kusian, ina cuo sakay kitakidan sakasepat ku nikasinganganan. . A-Cia-De-Ce (ťėŅŚä†Śĺ∑ŤĆ≤, Agadez) A-de-cia-ce u Cia-ce-ce tabakiay nu kitidaan a tukay, itini i likisian taneng talaayawen mikilim katukuh tu cay sip seci, u Tu-wa-lei binacadan a sakaetiman nu tukay, mala Sa-ha-la likelikenan nu sasasiwbayan a angangan, tatelungan nu likisi itida i tu sep cay lu mihcaan mala kitidid nu lalangawan nipahetikan nu babalaki. A-cia-de-ce tatelungan nu likisi u Muo-men-hu sakasingangan, itida i Sa-ha-la-likelikenan nu tumulan, kapalekalan itida i cay lim atu cay nem seci A-yi-e-su-tan kanatal a patideng atu Tu-a-lei-ke niyadu' itini mueneng nu zitayan, lilis han u tawyaay nu malumanay a lala'an, lilisay nu macimacian mahini tu ayda. sakasinganganan makaala tu tu pic mi, u amutu atu cenga anisangaan tina A-cia-de-ce biyuan, ina biyu nisangaan sakay kitikidan u satalakaway. micidek ku kaku, tabaki, u lala' atu kilang ku sangan, malasepatay nu kakuan, kapah ku nalimaan, madimel, pitu a tungdutan, kilul hank u kayakay mahida u culen ku sakatapabaw, taneng makatukuh i tungdut, makayda i tungdut pasaysasa pa'ngaw, mamelawmelaw kina A-cia-de-cen.

ni-ja-m…ôi naw adidi Ē~ °aj nu babutiŇčan nu nijadu Ē~ °an, ¶aj siw r~…ĺu n…ôm mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺa ni-z…ô tukaj am…ôr~…ĺik satu mar~…ĺańßat. ¶aj siw n…ôm s…ôp mińß ¶aan misit…ôk…ôd kina ni-z…ô ** d…ômiad. tabakiaj a tapaŇč nu kanatar~…ĺ ajdaaj nu ni-z…ô ¶uŇč-tuŇč ¶i muńßanmud…ô*pa ¶umu mu-ńßa-muo-d…ô. pa- ¶u-mu, ¶aj siw n…ôm mińß ¶aan ¶aj bur~…ĺad ¶aj d…ômiad r~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan, mar~…ĺa ni-z…ô ¶uŇč-tuŇč tu tu s…ôpt u ¶aj mińß ¶aan sip bur~…ĺad r~…ĺu d…ômiad ********muńßanmud…ô*pa ¶umu ********* ¶unr~…ĺi ******ouńßoumoudou mańßamadou , ************** u ¶unr~…ĺi nu nig…ôr ajza sa ¶i ouńßoumoudou mańßamadou , mi ¶akat a d…ômiad sa i **** a mińß ¶aan * bur~…ĺad * d…ômiad. r~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ sakapańßaj nu kasir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan u ¶uo, masiŇčaaj nu ¶uo r~…ĺu s…ôp wan tun, mikikaka tu kitakid nu nisiŇčaan a ¶aj ¶aj pasintu. r~…ĺin-suan-j…ôn nisiŇčaan ¶aj r~…ĺu .r~…ĺim s…ô pji ¶aaj ńß…ônaj kar~…ĺian, sur~…ĺu nisup…ôdan makaar~…ĺa tu n…ôm s…ôp s…ôp wan tun. idaw ńß…ônaj ku si, t…ôi, apuk, simar~…ĺ, kim nu ba Ē~ °tuan. ni-z…ô ¶aaj ka kapańß ku kukur~…ĺian, sakaj kitikid u ¶aajaj kaw mar~…ĺańßataj nu kanatar~…ĺ, sakaudip u kakar~…ĺukan ku aŇčaŇčan, sakaj mukinan mar~…ĺakudaj, nika ina tabakiaj nu ¶uo a kusian, ina ¶uo sakaj kitakidan sakas…ôpat ku nikasiŇčaŇčanan. . a- ¶ia-d…ô- ¶…ô (****, agad…ôz) a-d…ô- ¶ia- ¶…ô u ¶ia- ¶…ô- ¶…ô tabakiaj nu kitidaan a tukaj, itini i r~…ĺikisian tan…ôŇč tar~…ĺaajaw…ôn mikir~…ĺim katukuńß tu ¶aj sip s…ô ¶i, u tu-wa-r~…ĺ…ôi bina ¶adan a saka…ôtiman nu tukaj, mar~…ĺa sa-ńßa-r~…ĺa r~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺik…ônan nu sasasiwbajan a aŇčaŇčan, tat…ôr~…ĺuŇčan nu sa-ńßa-r~…ĺa-r~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺik…ônan nu tumur~…ĺan, kapar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺan itida i ¶aj r~…ĺim atu ¶aj n…ôm s…ô ¶i a-ji-…ô-su-tan kanatar~…ĺ a patid…ôŇč atu tu-a-r~…ĺ…ôi-k…ô nijadu Ē~ ° itini mu…ôn…ôŇč nu zitajan, r~…ĺir~…ĺis ńßan u tawjaaj nu mar~…ĺumanaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °an, r~…ĺir~…ĺisaj nu ma ¶ima ¶ian mańßini tu ajda. sakasiŇčaŇčanan makaar~…ĺa tu tu pi ¶ mi, u amutu atu ¶…ôŇča anisaŇčaan tina a- ¶ia-d…ô- ¶…ô bijuan, ina biju nisaŇčaan sakaj kitikidan u satar~…ĺakawaj. mi ¶id…ôk ku kaku, tabaki, u r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° atu kir~…ĺaŇč ku saŇčan, mar~…ĺas…ôpataj nu kakuan, kapańß ku nar~…ĺimaan, madim…ôr~…ĺ, pitu a tuŇčdutan, kir~…ĺur~…ĺ ńßank u kajakaj mańßida u ¶ur~…ĺ…ôn ku sakatapabaw, tan…ôŇč makatukuńß i tuŇčdut, makajda i tuŇčdut pasajsasa pa Ē~ °Ňčaw, mam…ôr~…ĺawm…ôr~…ĺaw kina a- ¶ia-d…ô- ¶…ôn.
